summary: Frontend UI testing complete for CreatorStudio AI. All requested features verified: Social media share icons (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) visible in Share modal, Mobile hamburger menu working correctly, Style Profile Gallery page functional, Mobile responsiveness pass.
critical_code_review_comments: ShareButton.js correctly implements all 4 social media share icons with proper data-testid attributes
Landing.js has proper responsive navbar with md:hidden classes for hamburger menu
GenStudioStyleProfiles.js page loads correctly at /app/gen-studio/style-profiles route
Mobile responsiveness is well implemented with proper breakpoints
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested UI features verified working. Social media share icons in Share modal, mobile hamburger menu, Style Profile Gallery, and mobile responsiveness all pass.

SOCIAL_MEDIA_SHARE_ICONS.details: All 4 social media icons (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) visible in Share Your Creation modal after generating a reel. Download Card and Copy Link buttons also working.

MOBILE_HAMBURGER_MENU.details: Hamburger menu (☰) appears on mobile viewport (<768px). Desktop navigation hidden on mobile. Mobile menu dropdown opens with Pricing, Reviews, Contact, Login, Get Started options. X icon closes menu.

STYLE_PROFILE_GALLERY.details: Page loads at /app/gen-studio/style-profiles. Shows existing profiles (Luxury Brand Style, Luxury Brand). New Profile button opens Create Style Profile modal with Profile Name, Description, Tags fields. 20 credits cost displayed.

MOBILE_RESPONSIVENESS.details: Landing page hero section, CTA buttons, feature cards all responsive. Buttons stack vertically on mobile. Stats section visible. Tablet view (768px) shows desktop navigation correctly.

screenshots_taken: mobile_landing_before_menu.png - Mobile landing before hamburger click
share_modal.png - Share Your Creation modal with social icons
style_profiles_mobile.png - Style Profile Gallery on mobile
